import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from workflows.agent_manager import generate_ppt_workflow

user_selections = {
    'dimensions': ['MT0', 'MT1', 'MT2', 'MT3', 'MT4', 'MT5', 'MT6'],
    'domains': [],
    'template': 'default',
    'use_llm': False
}

print\('='*50\)
print\('端到端测试开始'\)
print\('='*50\)
print\(f'Excel: assets/test_operator_A_5G.xlsx'\)
print\(f'模板: default_template.pptx'\)
print\(f'维度: MT0-MT6'\)
print\('='*50\)

result = generate_ppt_workflow\('assets/test_operator_A_5G.xlsx', user_selections\)

if result.get\('status'\) == 'success':
    print\(f'\\\\n✅ 生成成功!'\)
    print\(f'   路径: {result.get\(\\"data\\", {}\).get\(\\"ppt_path\\"\)}'\)
    print\(f'   页数: {result.get\(\\"data\\", {}\).get\(\\"slides_count\\"\)}'\)
else:
    print\(f'\\\\n❌ 失败: {result.get\(\\"message\\"\)}'\)
")

import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
import os

from scripts.workflows.agent_manager import generate_ppt_workflow

user_selections = {
    'dimensions': ['MT0', 'MT1', 'MT2'],
    'domains': [],
    'template': 'default',
    'use_llm': False
}

excel_path = os.path.join\('assets', 'test_operator_A_5G.xlsx'\)
result = generate_ppt_workflow\(excel_path, user_selections\)

print\('='*50\)
if result.get\('status'\) == 'success':
    ppt_path = result.get\('data', {}\).get\('ppt_path'\)
    print\('[OK] PPT generated: %s' % ppt_path\)
    print\('     Size: %d bytes' % os.path.getsize\(ppt_path\)\)
else:
    print\('[ERROR] %s' % result.get\('message'\)\)
print\('='*50\)
" 2>&1 | grep -E "\(Step|风格|模板|PPT生成|OK|ERROR|Applied\)")

import zipfile
import re

pptx = 'scripts/storage/ppt/report_c246d9f6_20260413_203905.pptx'

with zipfile.ZipFile\(pptx, 'r'\) as z:
    slide1 = z.read\('ppt/slides/slide1.xml'\).decode\('utf-8'\)
    
    solid = re.findall\(r'solidFill.*?srgbClr val=\\"\([0-9A-Fa-f]{6}\)\\"', slide1, re.DOTALL\)
    print\('Solid fill colors in slide1:'\)
    for c in solid:
        print\('  #%s' % c.upper\(\)\)
")
